name: queen-mq
description: Partitioned message queue on PostgreSQL — broker client + fluent streaming SDK (windows, joins, gates) in one package

scripts.test: node --test test-v2/streams-unit/configHash.test.js test-v2/streams-unit/operators.test.js test-v2/streams-unit/cycle.test.js test-v2/streams-unit/eventTime.test.js && node test-v2/run.js human
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:streams

author: Smartness
